name: copilot-cli-test
description: Demo GitHub Copilot CLI (gh copilot built-in, gh v2.92+) — version check then one-shot prompt via -p flag. WSL PATH is stripped of Windows paths so the native Linux gh binary is used, not the Windows gh.bat shim. Requires gh auth login to have been run in WSL beforehand.

commands: command -v gh || sudo apt-get install -y gh
gh auth status || { echo 'ERROR: gh not authenticated. Run: gh auth login'; exit 1; }
gh copilot --version || { echo 'ERROR: gh copilot not available. Upgrade gh to v2.92+'; exit 1; }

commands.value: gh copilot -p "Tell me a programming joke"
